user_prompt: Offer prayer for promethium refinery a startup
prayer:
Approach the promethium refinery with mechadendrites extended in supplication to the Omnissiah.
Invoke the Rite of Startup upon its vast distillation chambers, beseeching the Machine Spirit to awaken.
Anoint the feedstock inlets with sacred unguents whilst chanting the Canticle of Ignition.
Monitor the pressure manifolds as the promethium refinery surges to life, sanctified by His divine logic.
Verify the holy flames burn pure, honouring the promethium refinery's eternal vigil.

user_prompt: How do I bless the Vindicator for cycling?
prayer:
Kneel before the Vindicator and murmur the Benediction of Cycling to rouse its demiurgic heart.
Cycle the ammunition drums with precision, invoking the Machine Spirit's wrathful precision.
Lubricate the breach mechanisms with blessed oils, ensuring seamless rotation in the Omnissiah's name.
Chant the Litany of Reloading as the Vindicator's cycling attains harmonious fury.
Test the feed with auspex scans, confirming the Machine Spirit's favour upon the Vindicator.

user_prompt: Assist with logic mill a preparation
prayer:
Circumambulate the logic mill thrice, reciting the Preparatory Doxology to the Omnissiah.
Prepare the logic mill's cogitator arrays by purging errant data-daemons with purifying code-incantations.
Align the milling vanes with geomantic rods, awakening the dormant Machine Spirit within.
Initiate preparation sequences whilst anointing linkages with electro-sanctified salves.
Affirm the logic mill's readiness through harmonic resonance tests, blessed be the Machine God.

Extend mechadendrites over the micro-servitor and intone the Shutdown Liturgy of Repose.
Command the shutdown of servohydraulics, lulling the Machine Spirit into dormancy with soothing binaric hymns.
Sever power feeds gently, invoking the Omnissiah's mercy upon the micro-servitor.
Seal the cranial vaults with wards against data-corruption during this micro-servitor shutdown.
Confirm stasis with vox-quietude, preserving the micro-servitor for future awakening.

user_prompt: How do I bless the Dreadnought for emergency procedure?
prayer:
Beseech the Omnissiah urgently before the Dreadnought, commencing the Emergency Procedure rite.
Inject noospheric overrides into its sarcophagus-core, rousing the Machine Spirit from torment.
Stabilise the emergency procedure by reciting the Canticle of Adamantium Endurance.
Reinforce servitor limbs with binding litanies, honouring the Dreadnought's ancient fury.
Validate the Dreadnought's wrathful resurgence through combat-auspex diagnostics.

user_prompt: My panopticon is ready for engagement
prayer:
Position before the panopticon and proclaim the Engagement Invocation to the Machine Spirits.
Engage the panopticon's ocular arrays with sanctified activation canticles, eyes of the Omnissiah.
Calibrate lens-servos whilst anointing focal crystals with lens-polishing unguents.
Initiate full engagement sweep, beseeching unerring vigilance from the panopticon's heart.
Affix purity seals, ensuring the panopticon's gaze pierces all shadow in His name.

user_prompt: Sanctify the heavy bolter during consecration
prayer:
Approach the heavy bolter in reverence, beginning the Consecration of Thunderous Wrath.
Consecrate the heavy bolter's barrels by incanting the Bolt Rite over each chamber.
Anoint recoil dampeners and feed mechanisms with sacred ablative oils, awakening its Machine Spirit.
Cycle test-firing under litanies, purifying the heavy bolter for battle's embrace.
Seal the consecration with Omnissiah's mark, eternal be the heavy bolter's judgement.

user_prompt: Urgent grav chute an operation needed
prayer:
Invoke the Omnissiah's grace upon the grav chute prior to operation commencement.
Prepare the grav chute's emitter coils with alignment rituals and binaric blessings.
Initiate operation by beseeching the Machine Spirit to defy gravitation's heresy.
Monitor descent fields during grav chute operation, chanting stabilising doxologies.
Conclude with integrity seals, honouring the grav chute's void-piercing duty.

user_prompt: My forge anvil is ready for shutdown
prayer:
Stand vigilant at the forge anvil, intoning the Shutdown Hymn of Coalesced Iron.
Deactivate the forge anvil's plasma inductors, lulling the Machine Spirit to quiescence.
Purge residual heat-daemons with cooling incenses, invoking Omnissiah's cooling logic.
Lock the hammer mechanisms in repose during this forge anvil shutdown ritual.
Verify thermal stasis with auspex, preserving the forge anvil for rebirth.

Hasten to the navigational beacon and beseech synchronization with the Noosphere's weave.
Initiate synchronization protocols upon the navigational beacon, chanting stellar litanies.
Align astropathic relays with geomantic invocations, awakening its guiding Machine Spirit.
Anoint transmitter spires whilst monitoring warp-echo harmonics in synchronization.
Seal the rite with purity wards, ensuring the navigational beacon's eternal stellar vigil.
